mechanics.excerpt: Rifles Slug throwing rifles are the weapon of choice for the bud: get conscious Fired from the shoulder and chambering more powerful rounds rifles have greater range and accuracy than pistols_ Bolt-Actlon Rifle: Much like the revolver; the bolt-action rifle is a ancient design still favored because f its simple and rugged design.
